title: Mega Torterra & Infernape
description: A pack consisting of custom mega models for Torterra and Infernape
body:
NOTE: The megas are not set up to be accessible outside of commands. Everyone uses a different thing for megas, so I'm just providing bare bones. That is, until I can do everything via a data pack in the future. I will, however, be providing the mega stone pngs.

## Mega Torterra
**Type**: Grass/Rock

**Ability**: Solid Rock

**Stats**

HP: 95

ATK: 139

DEF: 150

SpATK: 80

SpDEF: 120

Spe: 41
## Mega Infernape
**Type**: Fire/Fighting

**Ability**: Moxie

**Stats**

HP: 76

ATK: 133

DEF: 91

SpATK: 118

SpDEF: 81

Spe: 135

# Credits
This work is not entirely my own. The provided models are tweaked versions of the designs Pizza (Discord: kratos0414) made.
